name: Okra and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomatoes, quartered, with their juice (1 1/2 lb)
1 Fresh hot pepper or Cayenne pepper to taste
Dry white wine or Chicken stock
Chopped fresh herbs of your choice for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a cast-iron skillet over medium heat until it is uniformly crisp. Remove from the skillet and set aside to drain.
2. Add the onion to the bacon grease and cook until the onion begins to become transparent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the okra and continue cooking until the okra begins to glisten with moisture.
4. Add the tomatoes and pepper and lower the heat. Simmer, uncovered, until the okra and tomatoes are stewed evenly, stirring occasionally and adding wine or stock to the pan if necessary to keep the mixture soupy.
5. Serve over white rice steamed in chicken stock and garnish with fresh herbs of your choice and the reserved bacon, crumbled. Serves 6-8.
